entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00094) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MOD P00094 IS TO RECORD THE AWARD TERM RESULTS OF CY13 AS DETERMINED BY THE TDO.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00095) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION (MOD) P00095 HAS THREE ACTIONS: (A)TO ESTABLISH THE BASIC CLIN 1136 FOR THE FIRM FIXED PRICED PROFESSIONAL MILITARY EDUCATION (PME) TRAINING SUPPORT PACKAGE (TSP) EFFORT AND ITS ONE-YEAR OPTION CLINS 1236, 1336, 1436 AND 1536; (B) TO INCORPORATE ATTACHMENT 50, PERFORMANCE WORK STATEMENT (PWS) FOR PME TSP IN SECTION J; AND (C)TO INCORPORATE EXHIBIT E-40, DISTRIBUTION AGREEMENT FOR THE UH-60 A/L 128 D(I) INTERFACE CONTROL DOCUMENT FILES, IN SECTION J.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00096) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION P00096 IS (A) TO DEFINTIZATE THE UCO FOR FSXXI ADDITIONAL CH-47F SIMULATION TRAINING SERVICE AT THE FINAL NEGOTIATED PRICE OF $38,129,492.00, (B) TO INCORPORATE THE ASSOCIATED ATTACHMENTS AND EXHIBITS IN SECTION J, AND (C) TO MAKE ADMINISTRATIVE CORRECTION ON PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE OF CLINS 1829, 1929 AND 1931 AT NO COST. PR#10543316 NOTE: TO LOWER GOVERNMENT RISK, NTE AMOUNT FOR THIS UCO WAS SET AT $12M.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00097) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MOD P00097 IS TO UPDATE THE PRICES OF THE EXISTING CONSTRUCTIVE GAMING BATTLEMASTER (CGB) FFP CLINS 1232 THRU 1932 FOR THE THREE ADDITIONAL CGB COURSES AT THE NEGOTIATED PRICE OF $7,011,398, INCLUDING THE ABSE AND ALL OPTIONS. THE BASE FOR LOT XII OF $519,380 WILL BE EXECUTED AT TASK ORDER BF07 LEVEL BY A SEPARATE MOD. PR#10549229

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00098) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION (MOD) P00098 IS (A) TO CLOSE AND DEFINITIZE TASK ORDER BF05 TO THE ACTUAL PRICES; (B) TO INCORPORATE EXHIBIT E-42, DISTRIBUTION AGREEMENT (DA) FOR THE AVIATION MISSION PLANNING SOFTWARE (AMPS) RELEASE 7.5.4 IN SECTION J; (C) TO UPDATE THE GOVERNMENT PERSONNEL DATA IN SECTIONS A, H2, AND G.6; (D) TO UPDATE THE VERSION OF THE ATTACHMENT 50 IN SECTION J; AND (E) TO UPDATE THE CONTRACTING OFFICER'S REPRESENTATIVE (COR) INFORMATION IN SECTIONS E4, F2, G1 AND G6. ALL TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THIS CONTRACT REMAIN UNCHANGED. PR 0010567777

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00099) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THSI MOD P00099 IS TO ESTABLISH CLINS 1139, 1239 AND 1339 AND TO INCREASE THE PRICES OF THE EXISTING CMT CLINS 1401 THRU 1901 FOR THE FIRM FIXED PRICED ADDITIONAL UH-60M EFFORT AT THE NEGOTIATED PRICE OF $54,896,278. PRS#10543316-0001 AND 10563298-0001.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00100) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION (MOD) P00100 IS (A) TO ESTABLISH CLINS 1141 FOR THE RECONFIGURABLE COLLECTIVE TRAINING DEVICE (RCTD) ONE SEMI-AUTOMATIC FORCE (ONESAF) 14 AND UH-60A/L AIRCRAFT SURVIVABILITY EQUIPMENT (ASE) AT THE NEGOTIATED PRICE OF $4,077,915.00; (B) TO INCORPORATE THE ASSOCIATED DOCUMENTS FOR THESE EFFORTS, INCLUDING ATTACHMENT 58, RCTD ONESAF 14 AND ASE TERMS AND CONDITIONS, AND ATTACHMENT 59 A AND B FOR THE TECHNICAL PROPOSAL AND INTEGRATED MASTER SCHEDULE (IMS), RESPECTIVELY; (C) TO UPDATE ATTACHMENT 14, UH-60A/L DESIGN BASE AIRCRAFT CONFIGURATION (DBAC) WITH CHANGE 5; AND (D) TO INCORPORATE THE DELIVERY SCHEDULE DATES FOR THE UH-60M IMPROVED GROUND REACTION MODEL (IGRM) AND ARC-231 MODIFICATION 11 RETROFITS IN SECTION C AS NEGOTIATED IN MOD P00099. NO OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OTHER THAN THOSE LISTED IN ATTACHMENT 58 SHALL BE IMPLEMENTED WITHOUT WRITING CONSENTS BY BOTH PARTIES. ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THIS CONTRACT REMAIN UNCHANGED. PURCHASE REQUEST (PR) # 10599220

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00101) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MOD P00101 IS (A) TO EXERCISE THE OPTION CL:IN 1138, PBP MILESTONES 5 AND 6 FOR ADDITIONAL CH-47F; (B) TO UPDATE SEVERAL DOCUMENTS IN SECTION J INCLUDING ATTACHMENT 57, 59A AND 59B; (C) TO EXTEND THE POP OF CLIN 1141 TO 18 NOV 15 AT NO ADDITIONAL COST TO THE GOVERNMENT; (D) TO INCORPORATE EXHIBITS E-43 AND E-44 I9N SECTION J. PR#10607078

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00102) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS BILATERAL MODIFICATION (MOD) P00102 IS (A) TO INCORPORATE FEDERAL ACQUISITION REGULATION (FAR) CLAUSE 52.204-9, PERSONAL IDENTITY VERIFICATION; (B) TO UPDATE ATTACHMENT 39, UH-60M DESIGN BASE AIRCRAFT CONFIGURATION (DBAC), WITH CHANGE 3, IN SECTION J; AND (C) TO UPDATE ATTACHMENT 39, TH-67 DESIGN BASE AIRCRAFT CONFIGURATION (DBAC), WITH CHANGE 3, IN SECTION J.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC N6133903D0014 (P00103) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
MOD P00103 ISSUES A CHANGE ORDER TO CEASE ALL TRAINING UTILIZING THE OH-58D KIOWA PLATFORM AS OF 1 OCT 2014.
THIS MOD ALSO ADMINISTRATIVELY ADDS THE CLAUSE AT DFARS 252.243-7002 REQUESTS FOR EQUITABLE ADJUSTMENT, AS WELL AS ADMINISTRATIVELY UPDATING THE WIDE AREA WORKFLOW (WAWF) INSTRUCTIONS FOUND IN THE CLAUSE AT DFARS 252.232-7006 WAWF PAYMENT INSTRUCTIONS, TO INCLUDE THE APPROPRIATE GOVERNMENT PERSONNEL.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES
